display_text: Helm of Iron Will, Cost: 975: Component item that provides solid early-game survivability by increasing armor and health regeneration. A cost-effective purchase for heroes looking to mitigate physical damage and sustain in lane or jungle. Stats: +4 Armor, +4 HP/s Regen.
